title: A Bloodline Marked for Death
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Scopper Gaban, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Rocks D. Xebec, World Government as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you've got gold feet, you can just stay behind on the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I was

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Let's move!! God Valley awaits!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Y'all are with me, right, fellas?!

dialogue.speaker: Scopper Gaban
dialogue.text: Roger Pirates

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: gyaban!! Where's God Valley?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's pretty far, but we should make it in time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ycourse we are!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rocks is already on the move! We can't let him get ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was an unlikely turn of events, but this small leak...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It seems Roger's heading there too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: LEAD WITH THAT NEXT TIME!! I'M ON MY WAY!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...led to the mobilization of all the toughest men on the seas!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's a giant ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who cares?! sink it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WAIT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is it, rocks?! We can't stop now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They said your entire crew was obsessed with this woman. That's how I knew I'd be able to intercept you here, rocks.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know, if we fought without any regard for our own lives, we could sink your puny little ship with ease.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See that vessel over there? It's a government surveillance ship.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're still trying to curry favor by playin' the government's laptop?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You may be King of the Overgrown Trustes, but you're understand' us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are ya really content to let the government sit back...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're nothin' but a giant lunatic, clingin' to yer deluded version of progress!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and watch as we tear each other apart?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why don't we talk it out? Just the two of us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YA must have an idea where we're goin'...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And what we're doin'...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Listen. This is for your ears only.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ain't gonna tell anyone else, not even my own grew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Your majesty, why talk to him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that bastard... We don't have time to take it easy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet even now my shakki's calling for help!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I've got a hidden name.

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: It's Dave D. Xebec.

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: You're not really called rocks?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I reckon the world government has been tryin' to erase this specific name for a long time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's tied to the lineage of the legendary pirate, Dave D. Jones.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The name still commands some influence in the underworld even now, but it's barely Scrapin' by.

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
